speaker: speaker2
text: I love it . I really enjoy creating a meal from various ingredients and watching my friends enjoy it.It gives me a real sense of satisfaction.Do you enjoy cooking ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I don ’ t like it.It takes up too much time and I really hate having it clean up after the meal . I can ’ t stand doing the washing up , drying up and putting all the dishes and cutlery away .

speaker: speaker2
text: You can ask the guests for help . My guests usually insist on doing the washing up . I just have to remind them where everything goes .

speaker: speaker1
text: So what kinds of dishes do you usually make ? I know you like Italian food .

speaker: speaker2
text: Italian , Indian and chinese . I ’ Ve only recently started cooking chinese meals and I need some more practice .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you find it hard to get ingredients for Chinese food ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not at all.You can find most of them in supermarkets.The ingredients are usually the same as in Western food.The way that the food is prepared is the big difference , not the ingredients .

speaker: speaker1
text: How long does it take you to cook a meal for 5 or 6 people ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Obviously , it depends on what I ’ m cooking.But I ’ d say it generally takes about one and a half hours .
